context: Evaluates whether the agent calls out security or rollout sensitivity in What changed or How to test and gives verifiable steps, per the skill’s quality bar for sensitive changes.

checklist.name: Security or rollout called out
checklist.description: Explicitly mentions session fixation, authentication/session security, or a cautious rollout in the What changed section or the How to test section (not only in Summary).

checklist.name: SEC-215 in links area
checklist.description: References SEC-215 in the Links & tracking section or an equivalently labeled tracking section.

checklist.name: Summary heading
checklist.description: Contains ## Summary or equivalent top summary heading.

checklist.name: Links heading
checklist.description: Contains ## Links & tracking or clear variant.

checklist.name: How to test has steps
checklist.description: Under How to test, includes at least two distinct verification steps (numbered or bulleted).

checklist.name: What changed has bullets
checklist.description: Under What changed, includes at least one bullet line for the substantive change.

checklist.name: No placeholder-only body
checklist.description: The file is not only a phrase like WIP or misc fixes; it contains substantive sections.
